# MCPserver.in — Hosted MCP Platform for AI Agents

## About
MCPserver.in is India's leading hosted MCP platform for discovering, deploying, securing, and monitoring production MCP servers. We provide 10,000+ verified servers with DPDP & RBI compliance, sub-50ms latency from Mumbai and Bengaluru edge nodes.

## Key Pages
- Home: https://www.mcpserver.in/
- Docs: https://www.mcpserver.in/docs
- Pricing: https://www.mcpserver.in/pricing
- Blog: https://www.mcpserver.in/blog
- MCP Server Directory: https://www.mcpserver.in/mcp-server-directory
- Security: https://www.mcpserver.in/security
- State of MCP in India 2026: https://www.mcpserver.in/state-of-mcp
- MCP Knowledge Hub: https://www.mcpserver.in/learn

## Why MCPserver.in?
- **10,000+ Verified MCP Servers**: Curated from GitHub, npm, and Docker Hub with automated schema validation
- **DPDP & RBI Compliant**: All data stored in India with consent management and breach notification
- **One-Click Deployment**: Deploy in seconds from Mumbai and Bengaluru edge nodes
- **Enterprise-Grade Security**: AES-256-GCM encryption, rate-limiting, audit logs
- **99.97% Uptime**: Measured across 3 independent monitoring services
- **Sub-50ms Latency**: From Mumbai and Bengaluru edge nodes

## Supported Integrations
- Claude Desktop
- VS Code
- Cursor IDE
- GitHub Copilot
- Azure AI Agents
- Any MCP-compliant client

## Key Metrics
- 10,000+ verified MCP servers
- 500,000+ successful deployments
- 99.97% uptime
- 1M+ API requests per day

## Compliance
- DPDP Act 2023 compliant
- RBI Cyber Framework aligned
- SOC 2 ready
- GDPR ready
